title: Cisco ACI Fault Trending by Severity, Type, Lifecycle State, and Acknowledgement Workflow
exclusions: Cisco Nexus 9000 NX-OS standalone-mode switches (use UC-18.4.* in the Cisco Nexus Dashboard subcategory; standalone uses syslog only without faultInst MO); VMware NSX alarm framework (use UC-18.2.*); Cisco Catalyst Center / DNAC fault telemetry (use cat-15 ŌĆö different fault model); Cisco UCS Manager faults (use cat-19 ŌĆö UCSM has its own fault MO hierarchy distinct from ACI); APIC clusters running 4.x or earlier (out of support since Mar 2024); ACI Multi-Site Orchestrator (MSO) cross-site fault correlation when MSO is in standalone mode without NDO migration.
dataSources: `index=cisco_aci` (rename per governance) combining **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:fault`** REST-polled **`faultInst`**, **`faultDelegate`**, **`faultCounts`** snapshots plus **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:fault_record`** historical **`faultRecord`** pulls; **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:fault_ack`** optional acknowledgement deltas; **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:audit`** (**aaaModLR**) mirroring POST edits; **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:syslog`** via **Splunk_TA_cisco-aci** for mnemonic syslog (**F0103**, **F0105**, **F0467**, **F0532**, **F0613**, **F0982**, **F2102**) corroboration; optional **`GET https://<apic>/api/node/mo/topology/HDfabricOverallHealth5min-0.json`** five-minute histogram sanity checks.
app: **Splunk_TA_cisco-aci** (Splunkbase **4022**, package directory **Splunk_TA_cisco-aci**) for **cisco:aci:syslog** normalization; **Splunk REST API Modular Input** (**rest_ta**, Splunkbase **1546**) or Python scripted collectors emitting **cisco:aci:fault**/**fault_record**/**fault_ack**; optional **HEC** receivers when newer APIC trains export webhook fault bursts.
spl:
index=cisco_aci (sourcetype="cisco:aci:fault" OR sourcetype="cisco:aci:fault_record" OR sourcetype="cisco:aci:fault_ack") earliest=-24h@m
| eval mo_class=coalesce(classId, mo_class, object_type, "")
| eval lc_state=lower(trim(coalesce(lc, fault_lc, "")))
| eval sev=lower(trim(coalesce(severity, fault_severity, faultSeverity, "")))
| eval code_u=upper(trim(coalesce(code, fault_code, faultCode, "")))
| eval dn_lc=lower(coalesce(dn, distinguished_name, ""))
| eval fd=lower(trim(coalesce(domain, fault_domain, "")))
| eval cause_lc=lower(trim(coalesce(cause, fault_cause, "")))
| eval fault_type=case(
    match(cause_lc,"(?i)(misconfig|policy|vlan|fv|vz|contract)"), "config",
    match(cause_lc,"(?i)(bgp|isis|adjacency|routing|endpoint)"), "operational",
    match(cause_lc,"(?i)(thermal|fan|power|psu|cooling)"), "environmental",
    match(cause_lc,"(?i)(lldp|icmp|neighbor|bfd|discovery)"), "communications",
    fd="infra","operational",
    fd="tenant","config",
    1=1,"operational")
| eval role=case(
    mo_class="faultInst","faultInst",
    mo_class="faultDelegate","faultDelegate",
    mo_class="faultCounts","faultCounts",
    mo_class="faultRecord","faultRecord",
    1=1,"other")
| eval tag=case(
    match(code_u,"F0103"),"F0103_port_link_down",
    match(code_u,"F0467"),"F0467_epg_vlan_encap",
    match(code_u,"F0532"),"F0532_port_deny_evt",
    match(code_u,"F0613"),"F0613_bgp_neighbor_flap",
    match(code_u,"F0982"),"F0982_power_supply_failure",
    match(code_u,"F2102"),"F2102_border_leaf_vrf_leak",
    match(code_u,"F1394"),"F1394_tep_ip_change",
    1=1,"other_code")
| eval cnt_crit=tonumber(coalesce(crit, "0"))
| eval cnt_maj=tonumber(coalesce(maj, "0"))
| eval cnt_min=tonumber(coalesce(minor, "0"))
| eval cnt_warn=tonumber(coalesce(warn, "0"))
| eval cnt_sum=cnt_crit+cnt_maj+cnt_min+cnt_warn
| eval active_like=case(
    lc_state IN ("raised","soaking","raised-clearing"),1,
    mo_class="faultCounts" AND cnt_sum>0,1,
    1=1,0)
| eval retained_like=case(lc_state IN ("cleared","retained"),1,mo_class="faultRecord",1,1=1,0)
| eval ack_hit=if(isnotnull(ackUser) AND ackUser!="",1,0)
| eval ts_raise=coalesce(strptime(created,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3N"),strptime(created,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"))
| eval ts_ack=strptime(ackTime,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3N")
| eval ts_clear=strptime(lastTransition,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3N")
| eval mtta_sec=if(isnotnull(ts_raise) AND isnotnull(ts_ack), ts_ack-ts_raise, null())
| eval mttr_hint_sec=if(isnotnull(ts_raise) AND isnotnull(ts_clear) AND retained_like=1, ts_clear-ts_raise, null())
| where mo_class IN ("faultInst","faultDelegate","faultCounts","faultRecord")
| stats sum(active_like) as active_rows,
        sum(retained_like) as retained_rows,
        sum(ack_hit) as ack_events,
        avg(mtta_sec) as avg_mtta_sec,
        avg(mttr_hint_sec) as avg_mttr_hint_sec,
        dc(dn_lc) as dn_distinct,
        values(sev) as sev_mix,
        values(lc_state) as lc_mix,
        values(fault_type) as type_mix,
        values(tag) as mnemonic_tags,
        latest(fd) as domain_hint
    by role code_u
| eval weight_band=case(
    isnotnull(mvfind(sev_mix,"critical")),90,
    isnotnull(mvfind(sev_mix,"major")),60,
    isnotnull(mvfind(sev_mix,"minor")),30,
    isnotnull(mvfind(sev_mix,"warning")),10,
    1=1,0)
| sort - active_rows
| head 250
| table role code_u active_rows retained_rows ack_events avg_mtta_sec avg_mttr_hint_sec dn_distinct sev_mix lc_mix type_mix mnemonic_tags domain_hint weight_band
description: Correlates Cisco Application Centric Infrastructure fault-managed objectsŌĆö**faultInst**, **faultDelegate**, **faultCounts**, **faultRecord**ŌĆöagainst Managed Information Model lifecycle attribute **lc** (**raised**, **soaking**, **soaking-clearing**, **raised-clearing**, **cleared**, **retained**), Cisco severity ladders (**critical**, **major**, **minor**, **warning**, **info**, **cleared**), delegated versus leaf-local semantics (**faultDelegate** **affected** versus **faultInst** detail), Cisco fault-category inference (**config**, **operational**, **environmental**, **communications**) via **cause**/**domain**, mnemonic taxonomy (**F0103**, **F0467**, **F0532**, **F0613**, **F0982**, **F2102**, **F1394**, **F4029**, **F4030**, **F119936** among catalogued codes), acknowledgement triplets (**ackUser**, **ackCause**, **ackTime**) sourced from REST edits or audits, retention interplay governed by **fvFaultLifecycleP** plus optional **fvFaultLcP** soak overrides, Splunk derivations for MTTA and MTTR-style service measurements, and optional coarse histogram checks distinct from numeric composite scorecards anchored elsewhere.
value: Pager hygiene improves when rotations rank delegated bursts, mnemonic-heavy repeats, soak-window churn, acknowledgement latency, and fault-count rollups together instead of reacting to lone syslog fragmentsŌĆöowners inherit actionable timelines tying automation edits to human triage minutes.
implementation: Deploy **Splunk_TA_cisco-aci** syslog plus HTTPS collectors authenticated via **aaaLogin.json**/**aaaRefresh.json** polling **faultInst**, **faultDelegate**, **faultCounts**, **faultRecord** into **cisco:aci:fault** families; ingest acknowledgement REST audits as **cisco:aci:fault_ack**/**cisco:aci:audit** and normalize FIELDALIAS macros for camelCase drift; schedule dashboards comparing lifecycle transitions versus acknowledgement timestamps with dedupe guards across transports.
visualization: (1) Stacked **timechart** of **active_like** faults by **severity** and **lc**. (2) Heatmap **faultDelegate** versus **faultInst** counts per tenant DN. (3) Table worst mnemonic codes with **occurrence** counters plus acknowledgement latency sparklines. (4) Single-value gauges for MTTA and MTTR derived from Splunk-evaluated deltas. (5) Faceted histogram mapping heuristic **fault_type** buckets toward severity tiers.
schema: CIM Alerts models fault severity strings, lifecycle transitions, acknowledgement metadata, and mnemonic identifiers; Inventory overlays anchor faultCounts rollups and DN-scoped backlog posture tied to Managed Objects.

references.title: Cisco APIC System Management Configuration Guide, Release 6.0(x)
Cisco APIC Faults, Events, and System Messages Management Guide

knownFalsePositives: **LLDP churn narratives** ŌĆö **F0105** storms during cabling refreshes mimic instability yet seldom merit tier-one escalation when rack elevation schedules explain neighbour churn rather than dataplane regressions alone. **Administrative silence masks** ŌĆö **F0103** bursts following deliberate interface shutdown work mimic outages unless maintenance identifiers reconcile Splunk timelines with approved cutovers. **Delegate-instance collisions** ŌĆö importing both **faultDelegate** aggregates and leaf-local **faultInst** copies doubles perceived severity totals across dashboards tuned for tenant summaries versus leaf troubleshooting squads until role filters partition KPI math. **Soak-window disappearance tricks** ŌĆö faults residing strictly inside **lc** states **soaking**/**raised-clearing** vanish when naive searches retain literal **raised** filtersŌĆöoperators falsely conclude clearance despite transitional churn captured inside APIC. **Retention rollover ghosts** ŌĆö aged **faultRecord** rows expire near **fvFaultLifecycleP** clocks while intermittent hardware defects recur moments laterŌĆöSplunk charts imply vanished trouble though sensors still chatter beneath the hood. **Automation acknowledgement masking** ŌĆö nightly bots stamping **ackUser** deflate MTTA KPIs without humans owning acknowledgement queues until Splunk excludes scripted identities through lookup governance. **Flap during clear-soak** ŌĆö oscillations inside **raised-clearing** mimic healing spikes while underlying optics remain unstableŌĆöpair timelines with **occur** counters before closing tickets. **faultCounts smoothing** ŌĆö coarse REST polls flatten bursts already visible inside syslog priority rampsŌĆöblend transports before declaring false calm.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
ŌĆó Production **APIC** clusters on supported **6.0(x)** / **6.1(x)** trains expose HTTPS **443/tcp** class pullsŌĆöprovision **read-only REST** identities distinct from GUI admins and rotate secrets after credential-review gates.
ŌĆó Install **Splunk_TA_cisco-aci** (**Splunkbase 4022**) where APIC or Nexus syslog terminates so `sourcetype=cisco:aci:syslog` retains mnemonic corroboration alongside REST pulls (**F0103**, **F0105**, **F0467**, **F0532**, **F0613**, **F0982**, **F1394**, **F2102**, **F4029**, **F4030**, **F119936** samples referenced during tuningŌĆönot substitutes for `faultInst.lc` truth).
ŌĆó Layer **Splunk REST API Modular Input** (**rest_ta**, **Splunkbase 1546**) or hardened Python collectors executing `POST https://<apic>/api/aaaLogin.json`, `POST https://<apic>/api/aaaRefresh.json`, then `GET https://<apic>/api/class/faultInst.json`, `GET https://<apic>/api/class/faultDelegate.json`, `GET https://<apic>/api/class/faultCounts.json`, `GET https://<apic>/api/class/faultRecord.json` with optional `query-target-filter` predicatesŌĆöemit `sourcetype=cisco:aci:fault`, `cisco:aci:fault_record`, `cisco:aci:fault_ack`, `cisco:aci:audit` (**aaaModLR**) alongside optional `GET https://<apic>/api/node/mo/topology/HDfabricOverallHealth5min-0.json` sanity pulls for five-minute coarse histogram drift checks only.
ŌĆó Normalize `dn`, `code`, `severity`, `lc`, `cause`, `descr`, `created`, `lastTransition`, `subject`, `rule`, `occur`, `domain`, `ackUser`, `ackCause`, `ackTime`, `affected` (**faultDelegate**), and `faultCounts` counters `crit`, `maj`, `minor`, `warn` with **FIELDALIAS** macros guarding camelCase drift after TA upgrades.
ŌĆó Map **fault retention** defaults under `fvFaultLifecycleP` (~five-day **cleared** storage) versus **raise/clear soak** windows often **30ŌĆō120s** clear-side; newer trains add `fvFaultLcP` per-code overrides that change how `soaking`/`raised-clearing` appear in JSON between polls.
ŌĆó Enforce Splunk roles with rights to `index=cisco_aci` (rename per governance) and block man-in-the-middle TLS boxes that stall modular inputs without obvious SPL failures.
Step 1 ŌĆö Land **MO**-faithful lanes for lifecycle, delegation, counts, records, acknowledgement
(1) **Syslog lane** (`cisco:aci:syslog`) captures APIC plus leaf/spine narratives including fault stringsŌĆöpair with REST because syslog alone cannot reconstruct ordered `lc` transitions or `faultDelegate` ancestry.
(2) **Live fault lane** (`cisco:aci:fault`) polls `faultInst` every **60ŌĆō300s**ŌĆötrack transitions across `raised`, `soaking`, `soaking-clearing`, `raised-clearing`, `cleared`, `retained`; slower cadence lowers **APIC CPU** load on dense fabrics at the cost of missing sub-minute flaps visible only in syslog.
(3) **Delegated lane** (`cisco:aci:fault`) captures `faultDelegate` rows summarizing descendant defects with optional `affected`ŌĆöuse rollups when triaging tenants but never add delegate rows to per-leaf `faultInst` totals in the same KPI.
(4) **Counts lane** (`cisco:aci:fault`) polls `faultCounts` for `crit`, `maj`, `minor`, `warn`ŌĆötreat like inventory gauges for backlog posture distinct from instantaneous `lc` snapshots.
(5) **History lane** (`cisco:aci:fault_record`) retrieves `faultRecord` rows when auditors exceed GUI retention windowsŌĆöalign `faultRecord.created` filters with `GET` templates using `gt(faultRecord.created,"2026-04-29T00:00:00")` style predicates after timezone normalization.
(6) **Acknowledgement lane** (`cisco:aci:fault_ack` or `cisco:aci:audit`) records `POST https://<apic>/api/node/mo/<dn>.json` payloads shaped like `{"faultInst":{"attributes":{"ack":"yes","ackUser":"jane.doe","ackCause":"investigating","status":"modified"}}}`ŌĆötie `ackTime` parsing into MTTA tiles once timestamps serialize consistently.
(7) Optional **HEC** receivers ingest webhook bursts where newer trains export streaming faultsŌĆödedupe using `dn` plus `lastTransition` fingerprints before merging with REST duplicates.
Step 2 ŌĆö Correlate Splunk stats across severity ladders, mnemonic tags, delegation roles, weighted hints
Paste after verifying indexes populate expected sourcetypesŌĆöextend `coalesce()` chains using `fieldsummary` when collectors rename JSON keys.
```spl
index=cisco_aci (sourcetype="cisco:aci:fault" OR sourcetype="cisco:aci:fault_record" OR sourcetype="cisco:aci:fault_ack") earliest=-24h@m
| eval mo_class=coalesce(classId, mo_class, object_type, "")
| eval lc_state=lower(trim(coalesce(lc, fault_lc, "")))
| eval sev=lower(trim(coalesce(severity, fault_severity, faultSeverity, "")))
| eval code_u=upper(trim(coalesce(code, fault_code, faultCode, "")))
| eval dn_lc=lower(coalesce(dn, distinguished_name, ""))
| eval fd=lower(trim(coalesce(domain, fault_domain, "")))
| eval cause_lc=lower(trim(coalesce(cause, fault_cause, "")))
| eval fault_type=case(
 match(cause_lc,"(?i)(misconfig|policy|vlan|fv|vz|contract)"), "config",
 match(cause_lc,"(?i)(bgp|isis|adjacency|routing|endpoint)"), "operational",
 match(cause_lc,"(?i)(thermal|fan|power|psu|cooling)"), "environmental",
 match(cause_lc,"(?i)(lldp|icmp|neighbor|bfd|discovery)"), "communications",
 fd="infra","operational",
 fd="tenant","config",
 1=1,"operational")
| eval role=case(
 mo_class="faultInst","faultInst",
 mo_class="faultDelegate","faultDelegate",
 mo_class="faultCounts","faultCounts",
 mo_class="faultRecord","faultRecord",
 1=1,"other")
| eval tag=case(
 match(code_u,"F0103"),"F0103_port_link_down",
 match(code_u,"F0467"),"F0467_epg_vlan_encap",
 match(code_u,"F0532"),"F0532_port_deny_evt",
 match(code_u,"F0613"),"F0613_bgp_neighbor_flap",
 match(code_u,"F0982"),"F0982_power_supply_failure",
 match(code_u,"F2102"),"F2102_border_leaf_vrf_leak",
 match(code_u,"F1394"),"F1394_tep_ip_change",
 1=1,"other_code")
| eval cnt_crit=tonumber(coalesce(crit, "0"))
| eval cnt_maj=tonumber(coalesce(maj, "0"))
| eval cnt_min=tonumber(coalesce(minor, "0"))
| eval cnt_warn=tonumber(coalesce(warn, "0"))
| eval cnt_sum=cnt_crit+cnt_maj+cnt_min+cnt_warn
| eval active_like=case(
 lc_state IN ("raised","soaking","raised-clearing"),1,
 mo_class="faultCounts" AND cnt_sum>0,1,
 1=1,0)
| eval retained_like=case(lc_state IN ("cleared","retained"),1,mo_class="faultRecord",1,1=1,0)
| eval ack_hit=if(isnotnull(ackUser) AND ackUser!="",1,0)
| eval ts_raise=coalesce(strptime(created,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3N"),strptime(created,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"))
| eval ts_ack=strptime(ackTime,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3N")
| eval ts_clear=strptime(lastTransition,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3N")
| eval mtta_sec=if(isnotnull(ts_raise) AND isnotnull(ts_ack), ts_ack-ts_raise, null())
| eval mttr_hint_sec=if(isnotnull(ts_raise) AND isnotnull(ts_clear) AND retained_like=1, ts_clear-ts_raise, null())
| where mo_class IN ("faultInst","faultDelegate","faultCounts","faultRecord")
| stats sum(active_like) as active_rows,
 sum(retained_like) as retained_rows,
 sum(ack_hit) as ack_events,
 avg(mtta_sec) as avg_mtta_sec,
 avg(mttr_hint_sec) as avg_mttr_hint_sec,
 dc(dn_lc) as dn_distinct,
 values(sev) as sev_mix,
 values(lc_state) as lc_mix,
 values(fault_type) as type_mix,
 values(tag) as mnemonic_tags,
 latest(fd) as domain_hint
 by role code_u
| eval weight_band=case(
 isnotnull(mvfind(sev_mix,"critical")),90,
 isnotnull(mvfind(sev_mix,"major")),60,
   isnotnull(mvfind(sev_mix,"minor")),30,
    isnotnull(mvfind(sev_mix,"warning")),10,
    1=1,0)
| sort - active_rows
| head 250
| table role code_u active_rows retained_rows ack_events avg_mtta_sec avg_mttr_hint_sec dn_distinct sev_mix lc_mix type_mix mnemonic_tags domain_hint weight_band
```
Interpretation cues: ŌĆó `faultInst` owns authoritative `lc` stringsŌĆönever infer lifecycle purely from syslog severities.
ŌĆó `faultDelegate` bubbles child faults upwardŌĆöexclude duplicate arithmetic against descendant `faultInst` rows feeding the same KPI numerator.
ŌĆó `faultCounts` snapshots resemble backlog gaugesŌĆöstill valuable when instantaneous raises flicker faster than poll cadence.
ŌĆó `faultRecord` stretches timelines beyond interactive Faults panes when Splunk retains JSON longer than `fvFaultLifecycleP` clocks.
ŌĆó `fault_type` maps heuristic buckets toward Cisco categories (**config**, **operational**, **environmental**, **communications**) using `cause` plus `domain` hintsŌĆörefine lookups where `descr` anchors ambiguous `cause` strings.
ŌĆó `weight_band` echoes Cisco severity weights feeding composite scoring (**critical** **90%**, **major** **60%**, **minor** **30%**, **warning** **10%**, **info/cleared** **0%**) without cloning proprietary algorithms wholesale.
ŌĆó `avg_mtta_sec` approximates acknowledgement latency only when `created` versus `ackTime` parse cleanlyŌĆönormalize identities via lookups before trusting automation aliases.
Step 3 ŌĆö Compare Splunk outputs against APIC **Faults** UI and lifecycle badges
(1) Compare against APIC Faults UI badges versus Splunk `lc_mix` on identical `dn_lc` pathsŌĆödrift implies stale collectors or duplicated transports.
(2) Expand `faultDelegate` `affected` listsŌĆöconfirm `dn_distinct` aligns with descendant MO paths surfaced in MITREE viewers.
(3) Compare `avg_mtta_sec` distributions versus `avg_mttr_hint_sec`ŌĆöinvestigate `ackCause` blanks during paging floods signaling governance gaps.
(4) Validate `faultRecord` pulls versus `fvFaultLcP` timersŌĆörapid `raised-clearing` oscillations resemble healed optics though `occur` counters climb.
(5) Optionally compare coarse histogram drift against `HDfabricOverallHealth5min-0` responses when Splunk timelines disagree with Cisco rolling summariesŌĆöstill prioritize `faultInst` detail over aggregate widgets.
Step 4 ŌĆö Publish dashboards routed around acknowledgement hygiene and severity-first paging
(1) Saved searches attach alert actions (**email**, **webhook**, ticketing webhooks) keyed on `weight_band`, `role`, `code_u` cohortsŌĆösuppression windows honor maintenance metadata.
(2) Dashboard tiles chart **MTTA** from **`ackTime`ŌĆō`created`** deltas and **MTTR** from raise to **`cleared`/`retained`** transitions paired with `occur` spikes.
(3) Heat lanes color by mnemonic tags (**F0103**, **F0467**, **F0532**, **F0613**, **F0982**, **F2102**, **F1394**) so bridge staff spot recurring optics versus routing versus power classes without memorizing code tables alone.
(4) Publish **faultDelegate** versus **faultInst** side-by-side panels to keep tenant rollups visually separate from leaf engineer views.
(5) Rotate automation passwords feeding collectorsŌĆösilent `aaaRefresh` misses resemble calm fabrics though `faultInst` rows keep accumulating unseen inside APIC.
Step 5 ŌĆö Troubleshooting misleading modes that mimic quiet fabrics despite MO churn
ŌĆó **Delegate stacked on instance counts** ŌĆö summing `faultDelegate` rows together with descendant `faultInst` volumes doubles perceived severity totals until dashboards filter `role` explicitly.
ŌĆó **Soaking blind spots** ŌĆö defects lingering only in `soaking` or `raised-clearing` states disappear when naive SPL retains `raised` literalsŌĆöoperators falsely conclude clearance despite transitional churn inside `lc`.
ŌĆó **`soaking-clearing` exits** ŌĆö `soaking-clearing` clears defects before `raised` activationŌĆö dashboards omitting that branch miscount benign churn versus actionable bursts.
ŌĆó **`faultCounts` smoothing** ŌĆö coarse polls flatten bursts visible inside syslog `PRI` rampsŌĆöblend syslog lanes rather than trusting REST counts alone.
ŌĆó **Retention rollover ghosts** ŌĆö `faultRecord` rows expire near `fvFaultLifecycleP` timers while intermittent optics recur moments laterŌĆöSplunk implies vanished defects despite vibration underneath.
ŌĆó **`raised-clearing` flap mimicry** ŌĆö oscillations during clear-soak windows resemble healing spikes though optics remain unstableŌĆöpair `lc` timelines with `occur` counters.
ŌĆó **`ackUser` automation stuffing** ŌĆö scripted identities stamping acknowledgement triplets deflate MTTA KPIs until lookups exclude predictable service accounts.
ŌĆó **CamelCase drift across TA bumps** ŌĆö modular inputs rename JSON keys causing blank `ackTime` fields until FIELDALIAS refreshesŌĆöinspect `_raw` after upgrades.
ŌĆó **Webhook plus REST duplication** ŌĆö webhook exporters replay `faultInst` rows doubling `active_rows` until dedupe keys leverage `dn` plus `lastTransition`.
ŌĆó **Cross-pod DN merges** ŌĆö identical tenant labels collide absent `pod` prefixes extracted via `rex`ŌĆöpager storms route toward wrong metro pairs.
ŌĆó **Scoped RBAC omissions** ŌĆö collectors authenticated without tenant RBAC omit `faultInst` rows analysts still observe interactivelyŌĆöexpand privileges cautiously with least privilege.
ŌĆó **HTTP 429 saturation** ŌĆö widen intervals after API timeout or HTTP 429 during bulk `faultRecord` reconciliations.
ŌĆó **NTP skew between APIC and indexers** ŌĆö distorted clocks inflate `avg_mtta_sec` mathŌĆömonitor stratum drift alongside platform hygiene.

ŌĆó Anchors ŌĆö **faultInst**, **faultDelegate**, **faultCounts**, **faultRecord**, **fvFaultLifecycleP**, **fvFaultLcP**, **lc**, **ackUser**, **ackCause**, **ackTime**, MTTA, MTTR.
grandmaExplanation: We follow each flashing alarm from first raise through soak timers into stored history, note who tapped the confirm button and why, and clock how long sticky codes lingerŌĆöso the night-shift story matches what the controller recorded, not guesswork from one rolling number.
hardware: Cisco APIC controllers (M3, M4, L4 form factors); Cisco Nexus 9000 ACI-mode switches as leafs and spines (Nexus 9300-FX/FX2/EX/GX/GX2/H series leafs; Nexus 9332C-aci, 93180YC-FX/FX2/EX, 93216TC-FX2, 93360YC-FX2, 9364C-aci, 9408, 9504/9508/9516 with FM-E2 fabric modules spines); IPN routers for multi-pod (Nexus 9332C, 9504/9508 acting as IPN). Multi-site ACI uses Cisco Nexus Dashboard Orchestrator (NDO; formerly MSO) for cross-site fault visibility and per-site retention scaling. Per-MO faultRecord retention typically held 5 days at default fvFaultLifecycleP policy.
